title: fancy swords
description:
this resource pack adds some cool looking medieval kind off swords
diamond - purple
all other swords have their original color just retextured
body:
Medieval Steel is a texture pack that replaces vanilla sword textures with detailed, metallic medieval-style designs. Every weapon has a handcrafted look inspired by real historical blades — rough steel, dark hilts, and refined detail that fits both PvP and survival builds.

The pack keeps Minecraft’s default feel but adds sharper, more realistic edges and a consistent medieval theme across all swords. Perfect for players who want a more serious or realistic tone without changing the rest of the game’s art style.
